target_audience: A framework operator deciding whether human disconfirmation is strong enough to reopen work on the runtime path instead of remaining a comment.
expected_runtime_effect: Human disconfirmation should reopen the session rather than leave the artifact green.
A rejected approval with Guardian veto should be normalized into a reopen trace with follow-up clarification.
The resumed path should produce proposal and review executions after the reopen.
remaining_gap: The trace proves reopen discipline, but it does not yet bind the rejection to a concrete weak artifact family with explicit human-facing quality notes.
Additional runtime-generated human-low cases should vary the source of disconfirmation beyond the current escalation path.
